infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: WanderSpot uses your camera to capture the street you are standing on.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: WanderSpot uses your location to identify the street and find local stories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: WanderSpot saves photos of streets you explore.

plugins.cameraPermission: WanderSpot uses your camera to capture streets you explore.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: WanderSpot uses your location to identify local streets and find nearby stories.

plugins.photosPermission: WanderSpot accesses your photos to let you choose a street image.
